technique: Oil on a poplar wood panel
description: This is one of the most famous paintings in the whole world! It shows a woman sitting calmly with her hands gently folded over each other. She has a soft, mysterious smile that seems to change depending on how you look at it. She is wearing dark clothes and a thin veil over her dark hair. Behind her you can see a dreamy landscape with winding roads, a river, misty mountains and bridges that fade into the distance. Long ago, Leonardo da Vinci used a special blurry technique called 'sfumato' to make the edges soft, like a gentle fog. This painting now lives in a famous museum in Paris called the Louvre, where millions of people come to see it every year!
ambiance: Calm, gentle and a little bit mysterious, like the woman is keeping a happy secret with her famous smile.
